transcript.text:
[It's frozen pork belly today]
[How many servings, you might ask?]
20 servings
[Someone who just had 30 chicken skewers]
[Why?]
[After 30 skewers]
I'm heading out for a meal
[30 chicken skewers are not enough]
3.2kgs, 20 servings
Let's see how much she eats
[I might have an idea]
[Finished]
Go home now!
[Who is she calling?]
-Hello? -Hello
-Hello, -Hey Mr. Tzu

[Mr. Tzu?!]
You said you'd treat me out to a kbbq
Right, I sure did
-Remember we went to that one pork belly restaurant the other time -Yes, right right
-Come! -Can I stop by?
-Yes -Really?
I'll be ready to use my savings
I'll be there in 30 minutes
-Really? -Yes
Do I need to ask them to close the shop for the day?
-Okay -Alright
Hello everyone
I'm here at comedian Kwon Jaekwan's restaurant
I've been here a couple of times before
And I loved it So I'm back
He said he'd treat me out some time

But I should pay for the meal, right?
Frozen pork belly
[Dontamra Jeju Pork Belly 1997] [Bangi-dong location]
Let's go let's go~!
Hello~
[Comedian Kwon Jaekwan]
Have you been well?
Congrats on reaching 5m subs
-I wish you luck on 100k -It will be soon
100k YouTuber will buy food for 5m YouTuber
Eat up
-I just had lots of chicken skewers -How many?
Around 30~40?
[What?]
-Literally just now -Really?
And you're craving meat?

Chicken and pork are different
[Right...]
Since you're here,
Take a seat
You've devoured the chickens
I don't like chicken that much
Is that why you ate 30 skewers?
We were thinking of feeding you some rice before kbbq
Maybe some rice with water
That's why I ate before this
I'm so thankful
You saved our restaurant
Then let's just start off with...
10 servings of pork belly
How about donburi too? (rice bowl dish with meat)
[Let's put in the order before she orders more]

Kimchi stew as well, please
[10... servings...?]
You heard it right
It's for 1 customer
Put it on the scale
Let's see how much she can eat
[This is... 10 servings?]
3.2kg is easily 20 servings
20 servings
That should be enough
Group of wrestlers' combo set
Thank you
[It's coming...]
Wait... this is...
Is this... right?
This is 10 servings?

It's like 20 servings
Incredible
Thank you
It's always served this way?
Combo set for a group of wrestlers
It'll be on the menu soon
Please have some with me
How nice of you
What do you mean!
[Back in May, 2020] Are you even listening?
[Back in May, 2020] Why don't you offer food to the driver?
Is that your life philosophy?
It'll be all gone when we arrive
[That was my prime...]
-Are you really grilling for me? -Of course
Really?

I'm good at it too
No, I got it
Why's the grill so small?
I think that's too big
[That cooking sound]
Look at the grease
Do you want to to-go some?
[All ready to eat]
[Can't wait] Eat, eat
Don't worry
It's all yours
It tastes even better
[Grilling kimchi in pork oil]
Sorry sorry sorry
I'm a little slow
[This is fast enough]

[2nd batch]
What is this?
Salt and garlic You can mix it up
Amazing
The garlic sauce is amazing
It's simple but really delicious
Really good
[Lettuce]
Don't bring us greens, please~!
She almost choked on her food
[He's a close friend of Jaekwan]
-Here you go -Thank you
-I feel bad for eating by myself -No no no
Make yourself at home
The fat is crunchy and tasty
With some garlic sauce

-Leek is great -Where's garlic leek? Come on let's get some more
[That guy...]
Are you at a zoo?
Don't humans eat 25 servings per meal?
[Here you are] Thank you
They gave me this much wild leek
I just finished watching your Ulleung Island episodes
I went there with a bicycle once
How do you go there on a bike?
Of course, I had to take a boat to the island
I went there 3 times in total
And I loved it
I love the meat there
[That glossiness]
Continue eating,
I need a break

These frozen pork belly taste better than regular pork belly
This part is chewy
Let's make a lettuce wrap
Salted Cutlassfish
Wild leek
Delicious
The sauce on the leek needs to be just right
The fat part has a great texture
Jeju pork belly tend to have tasty pork belly fat
Salted Cutlassfish
I love the smell too
Let's keep grilling
-Kimchi stew -Thank you
That's big!
It's usually smaller than this
-This one is just for you -Thank you

[Pork belly's bestfriend, Kimchi Stew]
Thank you
Tasty
You're a good cook, right?
I remember you cooked for us that one time all of us went camping
This is just what I like
[It's auto-refill]
Thank you
This is really comfortable tbh...
-I always had to grill, eat, grill, eat -Enjoy
Yummy
I'll try a bite
-Let's change it -What?
-The foil -Oh, yes
We'll change it after this
PD: That was almost like an order

Change the foil!
I was just asking haha
The soup is really savory, It's almost like braised kimchi
I have to come back here for kimchi stew
Come for both pork belly and kimchi stew
We need a new grill
I'm sorry...
He's a friend
Right, you told me that
He's a bit slow
-Should I cook watercress and chili peppers? -I can't eat watercress
-You eat chili peppers? -No
Hey, get rid of everything that's green
Put them back in the wild It's not for us
Garlic is so tasty
[She likes garlic?]

Thank you
One of us will turn into a human today (garlic myth)
It's going by rather quickly
Really?!
You're eating so fast
How is this possible?
[Happy]
Yum
Spiced scallions are tasty too
Some on top
Radish too
So good
It's been a while since I last saw him
He's always good to me And he's very funny
He makes me feel comfortable in a public environment
He's just the best

[Refueled with compliments]
[Let's speed it up now]
This is fine
Some black peppers, please
-These pork meats don't smell gamey -You're right
Thank you
It gets better and better
I've eaten a lot before, but not this much
I ate more than half
Let's grill some more
Do you think these cameras knew all they would film would be food?
They could've wanted to film scenery, or maybe flowers
You're right, come to think of it
[Thank you cameras...]
[Let's finish it up]
It's almost gone

[Forreal?]
How full are you in percentage?
I can't really say a number because
-Sometimes I'd be at 70% and... -Suddenly drop to 0%?
Just goes down like this
That's possible?
I digest really fast
Do you come to the shop often?
I used to come a lot, but I've been busy these days
I don't really go to my own restaurant these days either because of work
-I went there recently -You did?
When I wasn't there? Why?
[Why...?]
I want spicy rice cake too
Do I only have to eat pork belly?
You should've told me you were coming

I just went there to eat
Here you go
Thank you
We're almost out
Where did it all go?
How many did I eat?
[4 pieces]
More Fanta!
[Again, they are good friends lol]
Thank you
It's my first time doing mukbang this comfortably
So tasty!
Thank you
I wanted to share with you
That's such a lie
No, really

I wanted to share, but I ate it all
It's all gone
This one too I'll cook this one
[Cleared]
-Thank you -No, thank you
This is something you don't see every day
I want to save some for fried rice
I'll put fried eggs on top
Look at the colors
Thank you
[Clap clap]
All the customers are out now Eat up
The store is yours
It's going to be great
I'm full, but you're making me want a bite
Fried eggs are cooked so well

[Pop the egg yolk]
-I don't usually like making fried rice -Really?
But it's so good
There's a sales graph here
I think we sold the most Fanta today
I had 6 cans of Fanta at the skewer restaurant
[How many bladders do you have?]
That egg is yours too
-Really? -Yes
Imagine if you were born as a King back in the day
The people in the palace used to eat the King's leftover food
They would all starve to death
Take your time
I need to stand for a bit
I'm sad that this is stuck on the foil
You're going to make a hole on the grill

Look at that You did all of that
Look at the lines
What do we do now?
Some kimchi stew
The soup is excellent
It's better than the ones at Kimchi Stew restaurants
[Every little grain]
[Finished]
[Dessert]
Thank you
I said this place is yours
We've seen big eaters
But this was the best
I really didn't think you'd do it
There's a record here?
You

Someone that had 30 chicken skewers 1 hour ago
Came to eat 20 servings of pork belly
I will pay for today's meal You gave me a lot of food
I have to keep my word I told you to come, so it's on me
It'll make me feel better
As long as you had a good meal
Come often
Come often? No!
[We'd go out of business]
Go! Stop filming!
Thanks everyone~ [Subtitles by Hyun Choi] [antharoni@gmail.com]
